Nurturing Young Minds for a Brighter Future

At Mayoor, we provide a stimulating environment where students can discover their potential and achieve excellence.

Explore ProgramsVirtual Tour

ABOUT MAYOOR INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL

About Mayoor International School

Our school's journey began with a vision to create a holistic learning environment. We are committed to fostering academic excellence, critical thinking, and strong moral values. Our dedicated faculty guides students to become confident, responsible, and compassionate global citizens. We believe in a partnership between the school, parents, and community to support our students' growth.

+

Years of Excellence

+

Happy Students

OUR CURRICULUM

CBSE Curriculum & Academic Excellence

Our academic programs are designed to be comprehensive and challenging, catering to the developmental needs of students at each stage.

Pre-Primary

A nurturing start for our youngest learners, focusing on play-based education and social skills.

Primary

Building foundational knowledge in core subjects while encouraging curiosity and creativity.

Middle School

A transitional phase fostering independence and critical thinking to prepare for higher studies.

Senior School

Preparing students for the real world with specialized streams and career guidance.

Campus Live

Take a premium guided virtual tour of our state-of-the-art facilities, modern classrooms, and vibrant campus life. See exactly where your child’s future begins.

OUR FACILITIES

Why Choose Mayoor International School

We offer state-of-the-art facilities that support a well-rounded education and holistic development.

Classroom

Spacious, well-lit classrooms equipped with modern teaching aids.

Labs

Advanced science labs for hands-on learning

Seminar Hall

A well-equipped seminar hall for events and presentations.

Sports Leadership

Empowering students to lead with confidence, teamwork, and excellence through competitive sports.

Music Education

Developing musical skills, creativity, and confidence through structured practice and performance.

Transportation

Safe and reliable transport services covering all major routes in the city.

Admissions Open in Jodhpur

We are now accepting applications for the upcoming academic year. Take the first step towards an enriching educational journey for your child.
